# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface EdgeConfigValues {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures: boolean;
    maintenanceMode: boolean;
    enableAnalytics: boolean;
  };
  RATE_LIMIT: number;
  ALLOWED_ORIGINS: string[];
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigValues = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
  },
  RATE_LIMIT: 100,
  ALLOWED_ORIGINS: ['https://example.com', 'https://app.example.com'],
};

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigValues> {
  const connectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!connectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  const edgeConfigClient = createClient(connectionString);

  try {
    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimit, allowedOrigins] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('API_KEY').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('DB_URL').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS']>('FEATURE_FLAGS').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<number>('RATE_LIMIT').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string[]>('ALLOWED_ORIGINS').catch(() => null),
    ]);

    return {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: featureFlags
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS, ...featureFlags }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS,
      RATE_LIMIT: rateLimit ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT,
      ALLOWED_ORIGINS: allowedOrigins ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.ALLOWED_ORIGINS,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config, falling back to defaults:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function isFeatureEnabled(
  featureFlags: EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS'],
  flag: keyof EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS']
): boolean {
  return featureFlags[flag] ?? false;
}

function checkOrigin(origin: string | null, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  if (!origin) return false;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const startTime = Date.now();
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  const edgeConfig = await getEdgeConfig();

  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  const corsHeaders: Record<string, string> = {};
  if (origin && checkOrigin(origin, edgeConfig.ALLOWED_ORIGINS)) {
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Methods'] = 'GET, POST, OPTIONS';
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Headers'] = 'Content-Type, Authorization';
  }

  if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response(null, {
      status: 204,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }

  if (edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS.maintenanceMode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service Unavailable',
        message: 'The service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      {
        status: 503,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Retry-After': '300',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config' || pathname === '/') {
    const safeConfig = {
      apiKeyConfigured: edgeConfig.API_KEY !== DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      apiKeyPreview: `${edgeConfig.API_KEY.substring(0, 8)}...`,
      dbUrlConfigured: edgeConfig.DB_URL !== DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      dbUrlHost: (() => {
        try {
          const dbUrl = new URL(edgeConfig.DB_URL);
          return dbUrl.hostname;
        } catch {
          return 'unknown';
        }
      })(),
      featureFlags: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS,
      rateLimit: edgeConfig.RATE_LIMIT,
      allowedOrigins: edgeConfig.ALLOWED_ORIGINS,
      usingDefaults: !process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      responseTimeMs: Date.now() - startTime,
    };

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(safeConfig, null, 2), {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=10, stale-while-revalidate=30',
        ...corsHeaders,
      },
    });
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/features') {
    const flagName = url.searchParams.get('flag');

    if (flagName) {
      const validFlags = Object.keys(edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS) as Array<
        keyof EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS']
      >;
      if (validFlags.includes(flagName as keyof EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS'])) {
        const enabled = isFeatureEnabled(
          edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS,
          flagName as keyof EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS']
        );
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            flag: flagName,
            enabled,
            responseTimeMs: Date.now() - startTime,
          }),
          {
            status: 200,
            headers: {
              'Content-Type': 'application/json',
              'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=5, stale-while-revalidate=15',
              ...corsHeaders,
            },
          }
        );
      }

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: 'Not Found',
          message: `Feature flag '${flagName}' does not exist.`,
          availableFlags: Object.keys(edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS),
        }),
        {
          status: 404,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        featureFlags: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        responseTimeMs: Date.now() - startTime,
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=5, stale-while-revalidate=15',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/health') {
    const healthCheck = {
      status: 'healthy',
      edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      configSource: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
      apiKeySet: !!edgeConfig.API_KEY,
      dbUrlSet: !!edgeConfig.DB_URL,
      maintenanceMode: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS.maintenanceMode,
      rateLimit: edgeConfig.RATE_LIMIT,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      responseTimeMs: Date.now() - startTime,
    };

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(healthCheck, null, 2), {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
        ...corsHeaders,
      },
    });
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/protected') {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
    const providedKey = authHeader?.replace('Bearer ', '');

    if (!providedKey || providedKey !== edgeConfig.API_KEY) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: 'Unauthorized',
          message: 'Invalid or missing API key. Provide a valid Bearer token.',
        }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'WWW-Authenticate': 'Bearer',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: 'Access granted to protected resource.',
        data: {
          dbConnectionConfigured: edgeConfig.DB_URL !== DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
          featuresEnabled: Object.entries(edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS)
            .filter(([, v]) => v)
            .map(([k]) => k),
        },
        responseTimeMs: Date.now() - startTime,
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      error: 'Not Found',
      message: `Route '${pathname}' not found.`,
      availableRoutes: [
        'GET / - Configuration overview',
        'GET /api/config - Configuration details',
        'GET /api/features - All feature flags',
        'GET /api/features?flag=<name> - Specific feature flag',
        'GET /api/health - Health check',
        'GET /api/protected - Protected resource (requires Bearer token)',
      ],
    }),
    {
      status: 404,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        ...corsHeaders,
      },
    }
  );
}
